name: Fluid-Replacer Sports Drink
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the sugar and salt in hot tea.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Blend the tea and orange juice in a blender or shaker.
4. Drink cold for best taste.
Per Serving: 60 calories, less than 1 gram fat, less than 1 gram protein, 15 grams carbohydrates, 130 milligrams sodium, no cholesterol.
